title: Mineable/Minable AllTheModium Ores
description: Allows fake players (quarries etc.) to mine all AllTheModium ores
body:
# MinableAtmOres
[https://github.com/ton185/MinableAtmOres](https://github.com/ton185/MinableAtmOres)

Allows quarries and fakeplayers to mine AllTheModium ores

## What?
AllTheModium disabled the ability for fake players to mine their ores (which means quarries and FTB UltiMine don't work on it). This mod brings that ability back.

Note: They register their blocks with a hardness of -1. This means its technically unbreakable, but they handle some events to fix that for players. To make this work for machines, I had to set the hardness to a different value (100 if you're wondering).

## How?
Mixins

# If you want me to port this mod to another version of forge/neoforge then make an issue on the github.
